description: Release quality gates for TTS evaluation aggregates on an already-functioning narration lane. These gates do not by themselves justify engine replacement or Kokoro retirement; continuous multi-chunk playback and the retirement scorecard still govern that decision.

hardFail.reason: Warm Test voice previews must remain responsive.
Tail warm Test voice preview latency must remain within the approved narration-lane budget.
Median warm first-audio latency must stay within the approved narration-lane budget.
Tail warm first-audio latency must stay within the approved narration-lane budget.
Cursor/highlight drift should remain fully aligned in baseline matrix runs.

streamingFirstAudioMs.description: Streaming first audio must arrive within 3000ms at p95

streamingWordsPerMinute.description: Streaming must sustain ≥120 WPM at 1.0x rate

warnOnly.reason: Warm preview spikes above the approved threshold require reviewer acknowledgement.
Warm first-audio spikes above the approved threshold require reviewer acknowledgement.
Any max drift above baseline should be reviewed before release.
